name: restructure
description: Monorepo restructure: contract/, cluster/kind/, platform/. Establishes clean separation between cluster provider and platform. Archives all non-kind providers. First increment of the new architecture.
sprintGoal: contract/v1/ is validated, cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh and platform/deploy.sh exist and pass shellcheck — the three-layer architecture skeleton is in place and lint-clean.

stories.title: Monorepo restructure: contract/, cluster/kind/, platform/
stories.description: Establish the clean separation between cluster provider and platform. Create contract/v1/cluster.schema.yaml, cluster/kind/ skeleton, platform/ with deploy.sh. Archive all non-kind providers. This story is the rough shape — subsequent stories make each layer operational.
acceptanceCriteria: contract/v1/cluster.schema.yaml exists and is valid YAML
python3 contract/validate.py contract/v1/tests/invalid-egress-not-blocked.yaml exits 1 with AUTARKY VIOLATION message
cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh exists and passes shellcheck -S error
platform/deploy.sh exists and passes shellcheck -S error
bootstrap/providers/ is removed from working tree (archived in git history)
All platform charts are under platform/charts/
All cluster charts are under cluster/kind/charts/
stories.testPlan: Test 1: Validate contract schema YAML — python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('contract/v1/cluster.schema.yaml'))" exits 0. Test 2: Validator accepts valid fixture — python3 contract/validate.py contract/v1/tests/valid.yaml exits 0. Test 3: Validator rejects missing-egress fixture — python3 contract/validate.py contract/v1/tests/invalid-egress-not-blocked.yaml exits 1 with 'AUTARKY VIOLATION' in output. Test 4: Kind bootstrap shellcheck — shellcheck -S error cluster/kind/bootstrap.sh exits 0. Test 5: Platform deploy shellcheck — shellcheck -S error platform/deploy.sh exits 0. Show all output verbatim.
stories.readinessNote: testPlan added by planning ceremony. Ready for sprint.

stories.title: Kaizen: Fix attempts field — initialize to 0, increment only on review re-open
stories.description: The attempts field is currently initialized to 1 after first implementation, causing advance.py to report 0% first-pass rate for all stories. Fix: initialize to 0 in story schema, increment only when review ceremony re-opens a story (adds a reviewNotes entry). Update the formula in advance.py to use len(reviewNotes) == 0 as the first-pass check.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/ralph/lib/advance.py uses len(story.get('reviewNotes', [])) == 0 for first-pass rate calculation
shellcheck or python3 -m py_compile scripts/ralph/lib/advance.py exits 0
stories.testPlan: Show schema default and advance.py formula change. Run py_compile. Show output verbatim.
